heading: Foreign service appropriations; applicability
label: 1765 Foreign service appropriations; applicability
text: Provisions in annual appropriation Acts of the Department of State facilitating the work of the Foreign Service of the United States shall be applicable under rules and regulations prescribed by the President or his designee to activities pursuant to this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1978— substituted “this subchapter” for “this chapter”.Pub. L. 95–501
amendments: Amendments1978— substituted “this subchapter” for “this chapter”.Pub. L. 95–501
